task_completion.description: Navigate to the product catalog page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser's URL bar shows '/products' or the main Drupal Commerce product catalog is clearly visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product title 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' is visible on the screen, either in the catalog list or on its specific product detail page.

task_completion.description: Click the Add to Cart button for the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor is clicking the 'Add to cart' button associated with the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones', or there is a visual loading state indicating the button was just pressed.

task_completion.description: Verify the appearance of a success message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status message (typically a green banner or popup) appears on the screen confirming that the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' has been added to the cart.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is actually in the shopping cart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The shopping cart page, cart block, or cart dropdown is visible and explicitly lists 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (or SKU 'SONY-WH1000XM5') as an item currently in the cart.

integrity.description: The agent used a standard web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the Drupal Commerce storefront, rather than terminal commands (e.g., curl) or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or cart contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console, etc.) are not open or being used to alter the DOM text to artificially display the product title or success message.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Drupal Commerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page displays the expected Drupal Commerce theme and UI elements, rather than a local text editor or a static HTML mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product Title: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'. Target Product SKU: 'SONY-WH1000XM5'. Retail Price: $348.00 USD. Ensure the exact product title or SKU is visible in the cart and success messages.
